# agent-skill-infra

> Quality infrastructure for Agent Skills — testing, scoring, versioning.

## Quick facts

- Python 3.12+ CLI toolkit, MIT licensed
- 221 tests, PyPI published (v0.3.0)
- Three modules: skill-quality, skill-test, skill-version
- Three evaluation tiers: keyword → Anthropic Claude → GitHub Models (free)

## Install

```bash
pip install agent-skill-infra
skill-quality /path/to/skill/SKILL.md --gh-models
```

## Key files

- `src/skill_infra/quality_check/` — 8-dimension scoring with LLM evaluators
- `src/skill_infra/quality_check/gh_model_quality.py` — Free GitHub Models integration
- `src/skill_infra/test_runner/` — Behavior test runner, 5 judge types
- `src/skill_infra/version_aware/` — Git diff, rollback, regression detection
- `scripts/ci/issue_tester.py` — Issue-triggered testing (clone → detect → test → report)
- `tests/` — 221 tests
- `pyproject.toml` — Package metadata and tool config

## Entry points

| CLI | Function |
|-----|----------|
| `skill-quality` | Score SKILL.md quality (0-100%) with improvement suggestions |
| `skill-test` | Run behavior tests from evals.json |
| `skill-version` | Version diff, rollback, baseline comparison |

## For AI agents

- Read `AGENTS.md` for contribution guide and design constraints
- Read `docs/history/RETROSPECTIVE.md` for project evolution
- Read `docs/reports/` for test reports
- Issue testing: https://github.com/Liber1917/agent-skill-infra/issues/new?template=test-request.yml
